candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line; represents petroleum sales, which are the company’s main top-line revenue.
Includes petroleum revenues plus other income; useful fallback revenue definition if primary line changes.
Finance income, not operating revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Tax expense, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings measure, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Total comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Accrued Income from Sale of Petroleum Products
candidates.why: Accrued receivable related to revenue, but it is a balance sheet item, not the revenue flow itself.
Liability for unearned income; not the revenue line.
Long-term deferred income liability; not the revenue flow.

variables.notes: Petroleum Revenues is the main operating revenue line; Total income is added as a secondary fallback label in case the revenue presentation changes over time.

candidates.why: Represents direct costs of petroleum production, matching the concept of cost of goods sold/cost of sales.
Could be part of overhead or COGS, but the row is entirely blank in preview and is too generic compared with explicit Production expenses.
Exploration write-offs are not traditional COGS; more exploration-related opex/capex write-downs.
R&D-related, not COGS.
R&D expense, not COGS.
Additional exploration costs; not core COGS.
Overhead (SG&A), not COGS.
Likely SG&A/overhead, not direct production costs.
General overhead, not direct cost of sales.
Other overhead items, not direct COGS.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Unwinding of discount on provisions; a financing/estimate-related cost, not COGS.
Net financing item, not COGS.
Financing item, not COGS.
Operating lease overhead; not the core production cost line when Production expenses exists.
Supplemental disclosure of labor costs; may span COGS and SG&A, not pure COGS.

variables.notes: Production expenses best matches direct production/service costs for this petroleum company and is used alone as COGS.

candidates.why: This is income, not expense; should not be classified as SG&A expense.
Classic SG&A-type overhead (administrative expenses).
Likely includes various operating overhead costs beyond COGS, fitting SG&A components.
Additional other operating expenses; likely SG&A-type overhead.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit overhead expense components; excluded 'Other operating income' because it is income, not SG&A expense.

candidates.why: Explicitly labeled as R&D-related labor; part of total R&D expense.
Directly labeled R&D expense; primary R&D line even if current preview values are blank.
Capitalized development assets, not period R&D expense.
Gross capitalized development assets, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Uses the explicit R&D expense lines from the income statement; balance sheet development asset lines are not treated as R&D expense.

candidates.why: Primary line for interest expense; matches the desired concept for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; a secondary form of interest expense.
Interest capitalized to assets; opposite sign of expense and not pure P&L interest cost.
Represents non-controlling interests, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest already captured above; duplicate concept.
Balance sheet liability, not the interest expense flow.
Interest payable balance, not the period expense itself.
Debt principal, not interest expense.
Non-controlling equity, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Provides a priority list starting with the main Interest Expenses line, then lease interest as an additional source of interest expense if needed.

candidates.why: Tax item recorded in equity, not the equity balance itself.
Component of equity but not total shareholders’ equity.
Represents total shareholders’ equity attributable to owners; preferred BE measure when a separate Minority Interest line exists.
Duplicate total equity line; same numeric values as 'Total Equity'.
Balancing adjustment line, not a substantive equity measure.
Technical balancing item, not the actual equity balance.
Total of equity plus liabilities; not pure equity.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing adjustment line; not equity.

variables.notes: Selected the primary Total Equity line representing shareholders’ equity; a separate Minority Interest line exists, so BE excludes non-controlling interests conceptually.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation to minority interests, not the balance sheet equity amount, but confirms presence of minorities conceptually.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; directly matches MIB definition.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to the balance sheet Minority Interest line, which represents non-controlling interests in equity.
